classes.label: Person
classes.definition: A human being in the healthcare ecosystem

classes.label: Patient
classes.definition: Individual receiving healthcare services

classes.label: CareTeamMember
classes.definition: Healthcare professional involved in patient care

classes.label: PatientState
classes.definition: Current clinical or administrative state of a patient

classes.label: PatientStateTransition
classes.definition: A change from one patient state to another

classes.label: PatientDiagnosis
classes.definition: A diagnosis assigned to a specific patient

classes.label: PatientMedication
classes.definition: A medication prescribed to a specific patient

classes.label: PatientSymptom
classes.definition: A symptom reported or observed for a patient

classes.label: Physician
classes.definition: Licensed medical doctor providing clinical care

classes.label: PrimaryCarePhysician
classes.definition: Primary care provider attributed to a patient

classes.label: Specialist
classes.definition: Specialist physician in a particular medical domain

classes.label: MTMPharmacist
classes.definition: Pharmacist providing medication therapy management

classes.label: SocialWorker
classes.definition: Social worker providing non-clinical support

classes.label: BehavioralHealthSpecialist
classes.definition: Specialist in behavioral/mental health

classes.label: TransitionsNurse
classes.definition: Nurse managing care transitions

classes.label: MTMProgram
classes.definition: Medication Therapy Management program

classes.label: CareTeamAssignment
classes.definition: Assignment of a care team member to a patient

classes.label: CareManager
classes.definition: Care manager coordinating patient care activities

classes.label: CommunityHealthWorker
classes.definition: Community health worker providing outreach

classes.label: ClinicalOpsDirector
classes.definition: Director overseeing clinical operations

classes.label: Condition
classes.definition: A clinical condition or diagnosis

classes.label: ChronicCondition
classes.definition: Long-term persistent medical condition

classes.label: AcuteCondition
classes.definition: Short-term medical condition requiring immediate care

classes.label: CardiovascularCondition
classes.definition: Chronic condition affecting the cardiovascular system

classes.label: MetabolicCondition
classes.definition: Chronic condition affecting metabolic function

classes.label: RespiratoryCondition
classes.definition: Chronic condition affecting the respiratory system

classes.label: RenalCondition
classes.definition: Chronic condition affecting kidney function

classes.label: MentalHealthCondition
classes.definition: Chronic behavioral or psychiatric condition

classes.label: Medication
classes.definition: A drug or therapeutic substance

classes.label: HighAlertMedication
classes.definition: Medication with high risk of harm if misused

classes.label: LabTest
classes.definition: A laboratory test ordered for a patient

classes.label: LabResult
classes.definition: Result of a laboratory test

classes.label: NormalLabResult
classes.definition: Lab result within normal reference range

classes.label: AbnormalLabResult
classes.definition: Lab result outside normal reference range

classes.label: CriticalLabResult
classes.definition: Lab result requiring immediate clinical action

classes.label: ImagingResult
classes.definition: Result of a diagnostic imaging study

classes.label: Symptom
classes.definition: A clinical symptom reported or observed

classes.label: Allergy
classes.definition: A patient allergy or adverse drug reaction

classes.label: HighRiskState
classes.definition: Patient state indicating elevated risk of adverse outcomes

classes.label: HCCCode
classes.definition: Hierarchical Condition Category risk adjustment code

classes.label: RiskFactor
classes.definition: A factor contributing to a patient's risk score

classes.label: ClinicalRiskFactor
classes.definition: Clinical factor contributing to risk

classes.label: BehavioralRiskFactor
classes.definition: Behavioral factor contributing to risk

classes.label: SocialRiskFactor
classes.definition: Social determinant factor contributing to risk

classes.label: CareGapOpenState
classes.definition: State indicating a patient has an open care gap

classes.label: QualityMeasure
classes.definition: A measure used to evaluate quality of care

classes.label: HEDISMeasure
classes.definition: HEDIS quality measure from NCQA

classes.label: CMSStarMeasure
classes.definition: CMS Star rating quality measure

classes.label: CustomMeasure
classes.definition: Custom organization-defined quality measure

classes.label: CareGap
classes.definition: A gap in recommended preventive or chronic care

classes.label: OpenCareGap
classes.definition: A care gap that has not yet been addressed

classes.label: ClosedCareGap
classes.definition: A care gap that has been addressed and closed

classes.label: ExcludedCareGap
classes.definition: A care gap excluded from measurement

classes.label: InterventionPendingState
classes.definition: State where an intervention is planned

classes.label: InterventionActiveState
classes.definition: State where an intervention is actively underway

classes.label: CarePlan
classes.definition: A structured plan for managing a patient's health

classes.label: CareTask
classes.definition: A task within a care plan

classes.label: OutreachTask
classes.definition: A care task involving patient outreach

classes.label: ReferralTask
classes.definition: A care task involving specialist referral

classes.label: FollowUpTask
classes.definition: A care task requiring follow-up with patient

classes.label: Encounter
classes.definition: A patient-provider interaction

classes.label: InpatientEncounter
classes.definition: A hospital inpatient admission

classes.label: EDEncounter
classes.definition: An emergency department visit

classes.label: OutpatientEncounter
classes.definition: An outpatient clinic visit

classes.label: TelehealthEncounter
classes.definition: A telehealth or virtual visit

classes.label: SNFEncounter
classes.definition: A skilled nursing facility stay

classes.label: UtilizationRiskFactor
classes.definition: Risk factor related to healthcare utilization patterns

classes.label: Claim
classes.definition: A healthcare insurance claim

classes.label: SDOHBarrier
classes.definition: A social determinant of health barrier

classes.label: FoodInsecurityBarrier
classes.definition: SDOH barrier related to food insecurity

classes.label: HousingInstabilityBarrier
classes.definition: SDOH barrier related to housing instability

classes.label: TransportationBarrier
classes.definition: SDOH barrier related to lack of transportation

classes.label: SocialIsolationBarrier
classes.definition: SDOH barrier related to social isolation

classes.label: SDOHAssessment
classes.definition: A social needs assessment for a patient

classes.label: SocialCareCoordinationProgram
classes.definition: Program coordinating social care services

classes.label: FinancialHardshipBarrier
classes.definition: SDOH barrier related to financial hardship

classes.label: VBCContract
classes.definition: A value-based care contract between payer and provider

classes.label: Organization
classes.definition: A healthcare organization

classes.label: HealthSystem
classes.definition: A large integrated health system

classes.label: ACO
classes.definition: Accountable Care Organization

classes.label: MedicalGroup
classes.definition: A group medical practice

classes.label: Practice
classes.definition: A clinical practice site

classes.label: Pharmacy
classes.definition: A pharmacy organization

classes.label: CommunityOrganization
classes.definition: A community-based organization providing social services

classes.label: EnrolledState
classes.definition: State indicating patient is enrolled in a program

classes.label: TransitionOfCareState
classes.definition: State indicating patient is in care transition

classes.label: StableState
classes.definition: State indicating patient condition is stable

classes.label: LostToFollowUpState
classes.definition: State indicating patient is lost to follow-up

classes.label: DisenrolledState
classes.definition: State indicating patient has been disenrolled

classes.label: Program
classes.definition: A health management or care program

classes.label: ProgramEnrollment
classes.definition: A patient's enrollment in a health program

classes.label: ClinicalEvent
classes.definition: A significant clinical event in patient history

classes.label: ClinicalNote
classes.definition: A clinical documentation note

classes.label: ImagingStudy
classes.definition: A diagnostic imaging study

classes.label: Procedure
classes.definition: A clinical procedure performed on a patient

classes.label: Referral
classes.definition: A provider-to-provider referral

classes.label: Authorization
classes.definition: A prior authorization for a service

classes.label: Insurance
classes.definition: A patient's insurance coverage

classes.label: Network
classes.definition: A provider network

classes.label: Panel
classes.definition: A provider's attributed patient panel

classes.label: Affiliation
classes.definition: A provider's affiliation with a facility

classes.label: DrugInteraction
classes.definition: An interaction between two medications

classes.label: DrugDiseaseInteraction
classes.definition: An interaction between a drug and a disease state

classes.label: AdverseEffect
classes.definition: An adverse effect associated with a medication

classes.label: ICD10Code
classes.definition: An ICD-10 diagnosis or procedure code

classes.label: CPTCode
classes.definition: A Current Procedural Terminology code

classes.label: LOINCCode
classes.definition: A LOINC laboratory or clinical observation code

classes.label: NDCCode
classes.definition: A National Drug Code

classes.label: SNOMEDCode
classes.definition: A SNOMED CT clinical concept code

classes.label: HCPCSCode
classes.definition: A HCPCS procedure or supply code

classes.label: RxNormCode
classes.definition: An RxNorm drug concept code

classes.label: FHIRResource
classes.definition: A HL7 FHIR R4 resource

classes.label: RiskPredictionModel
classes.definition: An AI/ML model for predicting patient risk

classes.label: RiskScore
classes.definition: A calculated risk score for a patient

classes.label: CohortDefinition
classes.definition: A definition of a patient cohort

classes.label: StratificationRule
classes.definition: A rule for stratifying patients by risk or need

classes.label: ClinicalProtocol
classes.definition: A clinical care protocol or guideline

classes.label: PopulationHealthProgram
classes.definition: A population health management program

classes.label: HealthEquityMetric
classes.definition: A metric measuring health equity outcomes

classes.label: PatientEngagementScore
classes.definition: A score measuring patient engagement level

classes.label: SDoHScreening
classes.definition: A screening tool for social determinants of health

classes.label: ZipCode
classes.definition: A geographic zip code for area-level risk

classes.label: ADIScore
classes.definition: Area Deprivation Index score for a geographic area

classes.label: VitalSign
classes.definition: A physiologic vital sign measurement

classes.label: FunctionalAssessment
classes.definition: A functional status or ADL assessment

classes.label: Immunization
classes.definition: A vaccine or immunization administered to a patient

classes.label: Attribution
classes.definition: Assignment of a patient to an attributed provider

classes.label: QualityReportCard
classes.definition: A quality performance report card for a provider or org

classes.label: PopulationSegment
classes.definition: A segment of the patient population for analytics

classes.label: DRGCode
classes.definition: Diagnosis Related Group inpatient classification code

classes.label: RevenueCode
classes.definition: UB-04 revenue code on institutional claim

classes.label: OutcomesMeasure
classes.definition: A clinical outcomes measurement

classes.label: Discharge

classes.label: CarePathway
classes.definition: A structured clinical care pathway for a condition

classes.label: PMPM

classes.label: TCOC
